complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Set up Cargo workspace and project scaffolding
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Create workspace Cargo.toml and crate directories, 2) Configure dependencies and basic builds for each crate, 3) Implement minimal eframe app in ket-gui with cross-platform targets.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Standard Rust workspace setup with known dependencies (egui, eframe, nalgebra); low complexity due to boilerplate nature, cross-platform config is routine, testing via cargo commands is straightforward.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Implement Circuit data model in ket-core
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Define core structs and enums (Circuit, QubitWire, PlacedGate, GateType), 2) Add Serialize/Deserialize derives and basic validation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Straightforward struct/enum definitions with serde; moderate complexity from defining 15+ GateType variants and ensuring serializable design per PRD.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Subtasks: 1) Implement QubitWire struct, 2) add_qubit() and remove_qubit(), 3) rename_qubit(), 4) reorder_qubits() with gate index auto-updates.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Requires careful index management and auto-updating gate targets on structural changes; higher complexity due to potential off-by-one errors and consistency guarantees.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split: 1) Single-qubit gate matrices (H,X,Y,Z,S,T), 2) Multi-qubit matrices (CNOT,CZ,SWAP,Toffoli), 3) Parameterized rotations Rx/Ry/Rz.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Involves precise matrix definitions with nalgebra/Complex; moderate due to math accuracy requirements and testing against known quantum gate standards.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break into: 1) Add QuantRS2 dependency with feature flags, 2) Implement StateVectorSimulator wrapper, 3) Fallback custom simulator and Bell state tests.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Third-party integration with fallback; complexity from API wrapping, error handling, and ensuring simulation fidelity for quantum states.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Subtasks: 1) Wire rendering, 2) Single-qubit gate boxes, 3) Multi-qubit controls/connections, 4) Grid/column layout in egui.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Custom egui painting for quantum circuit diagrams; UI layout challenges with variable gate sizes and connections increase complexity.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide: 1) Bar chart with probability/phase coloring, 2) Toggleable amplitude table.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Standard egui plotting with phase-based colors; moderate due to quantum state visualization specifics but leverages egui primitives.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Serde impl for Circuit and components, 2) File I/O methods with validation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Serde handles most serialization; low-moderate complexity with schema validation and roundtrip testing.
Manual creation of standard quantum circuits (Bell, GHZ, etc.); low effort, data-only task with verification via existing sim.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Basic qubit/gate counts, 2) Memory estimates from QuantRS2 with warnings.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Simple egui widget aggregating existing data; straightforward calculations.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Subtasks: 1) Collapsible sections, 2) Gate buttons with icons/text, 3) Drag mode triggering.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: egui panel with categorization; moderate UI state management for drag selection.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Drag state tracking from palette, 2) Drop zones/wire highlights, 3) Single-qubit insertion, 4) Multi-qubit placement workflow.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Complex egui drag-drop interaction with hit detection and circuit mutation; high due to precise positioning and UX polish.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Right-click context menus, 2) Edit/delete/copy operations, 3) Multi-select and paste.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: egui context menus with param editing; complexity from selection state and paste positioning.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down: 1) Define EditOperation enum, 2) EditHistory stack impl, 3) Operation recording for all edits, 4) Undo/redo dispatch, 5) Key bindings.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Command pattern for circuit mutations; high complexity ensuring all operations (add/remove/move/edit) are reversible without state corruption.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Edit event detection, 2) Tokio debounce timer, 3) Background sim thread, 4) Manual sim fallback for large circuits.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Async threading with debounce and state sync; challenges in thread safety and performance for real-time quantum sim.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Reduced density matrix via partial trace, 2) Bloch vector computation, 3) egui Painter2d sphere/arrow, 4) Interactive view rotation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Quantum math (partial trace) + custom egui 3D projection; high due to numerical stability and visualization accuracy.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Stepper controls UI, 2) Column-wise gate application, 3) State update and cursor rendering.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Incremental simulation with UI sync; complexity in partial circuit execution and reversible stepping.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Concurrence/entanglement entropy calc, 2) Cluster detection algorithm, 3) Color assignment, 4) Rendering integration.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Advanced quantum info theory metrics and graph clustering; high mathematical and algorithmic complexity.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Gate counts/depth/qubit stats, 2) Memory/hardware estimates.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Aggregation of circuit properties; straightforward analytics UI.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Gate mapping to QASM syntax, 2) Header/qreg/creg/barrier generation, 3) String formatting and validation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Format-specific mapping with standard (qreg h cx); moderate parser-like string construction.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Qiskit QuantumCircuit code generation, 2) Gate mapping and parameter handling.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Similar to QASM but Python syntax; lower complexity as string templating.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Nom parser for QASM grammar, 2) qreg/gate/measure handling, 3) GateType mapping, 4) Error recovery, 5) Roundtrip testing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Full parser implementation with nom; high complexity due to grammar ambiguities and error handling.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Capture egui painter paths, 2) Convert to SVG paths, 3) A4 scaling and export.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Graphics path translation; moderate effort reusing renderer logic.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) UI categories/search, 2) Example loading, 3) Thumbnails/previews generation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: egui file browser with previews; standard UI but thumbnail rendering adds minor complexity.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Core shortcuts (undo/delete/copy), 2) Wire management hotkeys.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: egui input handling; low complexity wiring to existing actions.
